steps.t: Use the summoning horn at the east side of the hill to summon Radhril to your side.
You should talk to Radhril. <rgb=#FF0000>If Radhril is missing, and the Call Radhril skill is not available, try using the /pet release command.…
You should find Svalfang. <rgb=#FF0000>If Radhril is missing, and the Call Radhril skill is not available, try using the /pet release command.&l…
You should defeat Svalfang. <rgb=#FF0000>If Radhril is missing, and the Call Radhril skill is not available, try using the /pet release command.…
